qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

events.description: 埃德森·阿尔瓦雷斯替补登场，换下塞萨尔·蒙特斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Declan Rice (England).
Declan Rice (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Luis Romo (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门被封堵。 吉尔伯托·莫拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jorge Sánchez (Mexico).
Foul by Érik Lira (Mexico).
Foul by Gilberto Mora (Mexico).
Corner, England. Conceded by Jorge Sánchez.
Attempt saved. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射正。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Jordan Pickford.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Jude Bellingham.
Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Attempt blocked. Gilberto Mora (Mexico) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 吉尔伯托·莫拉射门被封堵。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by César Montes (Mexico).
Corner, England. Conceded by Érik Lira.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Anthony Gordon (England) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Jordan Pickford.

events.description: 安东尼·哥顿射正。 乔丹·皮克福德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Raúl Jiménez (Mexico).
Attempt missed. Luis Romo (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 路易斯·罗莫射门偏出。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Gilberto Mora (Mexico).
Goal! Mexico 0, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross.

events.description: 贝林厄姆破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Mexico 0, England 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Harry Kane.

events.description: 贝林厄姆破门。 比分 0-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Bukayo Saka (England).
Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Goal! Mexico 1, England 2. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal following a set piece situation.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯破门。 比分 1-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Mexico. Edson Álvarez replaces César Montes.

events.description: 埃德森·阿尔瓦雷斯替补登场，换下塞萨尔·蒙特斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门偏出。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top left corner by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射正。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Jordan Pickford.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Jude Bellingham.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jorge Sánchez (Mexico).
First Half ends, Mexico 1, England 2.
Second Half begins Mexico 1, England 2.
Érik Lira (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门被封堵。 埃里克·里拉参与进攻。

Jesús Gallardo (Mexico) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, England. John Stones replaces Bukayo Saka.

events.description: 约翰·斯通斯替补登场，换下萨卡。

qualifiers.espnText: Penalty conceded by Raúl Rangel (Mexico) after a foul in the penalty area.

Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 圣地亚哥·吉梅内斯替补登场，换下吉尔伯托·莫拉。

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯替补登场，换下路易斯·罗莫。

qualifiers.espnText: (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Edson Álvarez (Mexico).

events.description: 埃德森·阿尔瓦雷斯犯规。

Marc Guéhi (England) is shown the yellow card.
